2604.11307.title: PaperScope: A Multi-Modal Multi-Document Benchmark for Agentic Deep Research Across Massive Scientific Papers
2604.11307.paper_summary: Leveraging Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to accelerate frontier scientific research is promising, yet how to rigorously evaluate such systems remains unclear. Existing benchmarks mainly focus on single-document understanding, whereas real scientific workflows require integrating evidence from multiple papers, including their text, tables, and figures. As a result, multi-modal, multi-document scientific reasoning remains underexplored and lacks systematic evaluation. To address this gap, we introduce PaperScope, a multi-modal multi-document benchmark designed for agentic deep research. PaperScope presents three advantages: (1) Structured scientific grounding. It is built on a knowledge graph of over 2,000 AI papers spanning three years, providing a structured foundation for research-oriented queries. (2) Semantically dense evidence construction. It integrates semantically related key information nodes and employs optimized random-walk article selector to sample thematically coherent paper sets, thereby ensuring adequate semantic density and task complexity. (3) Multi-task evaluation of scientific reasoning. It contains over 2,000 QA pairs across reasoning, retrieval, summarization, and problem solving, enabling evaluation of multi-step scientific reasoning. Experimental results show that even advanced systems such as OpenAI Deep Research and Tongyi Deep Research achieve limited scores on PaperScope, highlighting the difficulty of long-context retrieval and deep multi-source reasoning. PaperScope thus provides a rigorous benchmark alongside a scalable pipeline for constructing large-scale multi-modal, multi-source deep research datasets.
2604.11307.paper_summary_zh: 利用多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）來加速前沿科學研究是有前景的，但如何嚴格評估這些系統仍不清楚。<lb/>現有的基準主要集中在單文件理解上，而真正的科學工作流程需要整合來自多篇論文的證據，包括它們的文本、表格和圖形。<lb/>因此，多模態、多文件的科學推理仍然未被充分探索，且缺乏系統評估。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們介紹了PaperScope，一個旨在促進深度研究的多模態多文件基準。<lb/>PaperScope具有三個優勢：（1）結構化的科學基礎。<lb/>它建立在一個涵蓋三年內超過2000篇AI論文的知識圖譜之上，為以研究為導向的查詢提供了結構化的基礎。（2）語義密集的證據構建。<lb/>它整合了語義相關的關鍵信息節點，並使用優化的隨機漫遊文章選擇器來抽樣主題一致的論文集，從而確保足夠的語義密度和任務複雜性。（3）科學推理的多任務評估。<lb/>它包含超過2000對問答對，涵蓋推理、檢索、總結和問題解決，能夠評估多步驟的科學推理。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，即使是像OpenAI Deep Research和Tongyi Deep Research這樣的先進系統在PaperScope上的得分也有限，突顯了長上下文檢索和深度多源推理的困難。<lb/>因此，PaperScope提供了一個嚴格的基準，以及一個可擴展的管道，用於構建大規模的多模態、多源深度研究數據集。
2604.11307.author: Lei Xiong et.al.
2604.11307.authors: Lei Xiong, Huaying Yuan, Zheng Liu, Zhao Cao, Zhicheng Dou
